subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God! Praise be to God that ye have been guided by the Light of Guidance, have become attracted
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی شکر خدا را که بنور هدی مهتدی شدید و منجذب بنفحات قدس از ملا اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @loving community spirit in teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
